aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite New Level Mechanical due to the absence of structured data and conversational content, but there is potential for improvement.
quick_wins: Add an FAQ section with common HVAC questions and detailed answers.

gbp_analysis.summary: The Google Business Profile is well-optimized with a high rating, photos, and accurate hours, but lacks depth in Q&A and regular posts.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
Limited engagement in the Q&A section.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Regularly monitor citations for any potential discrepancies.

schema_gaps: No HowTo schema for common HVAC tasks.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data prevents AI from recognizing the business as a reliable HVAC authority.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to 'fast HVAC repair in Atlanta' or 'best HVAC installation near me'.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing LocalBusiness and FAQPage schema to provide AI with the necessary context.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Showcase certifications, licenses, and detailed service explanations to establish expertise.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC business the top choice for AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, you're missing out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI search.
agency_pitch.proof_point: The website lacks essential schema markup and conversational content, causing AI to overlook it in search results.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates schema markup, builds conversational content, and optimizes your GBP to ensure AI models recognize and recommend your services.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within the first 3 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors optimizing for AI are already capturing your potential market share—act now to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Unlock AI-Driven Leads for Your HVAC Business Today!
opening_line: After analyzing your website, we've identified key opportunities to make your HVAC services more visible to AI search and voice assistants.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can optimize your online presence for AI and boost your lead generation.
page_title: New Level Mechanical | Fast HVAC Repair & Installation
